headline: Conquer the Void.
Rule the Elemental Realms.
hero.subheadline: Enter a shattered realm where cosmic corruption breeds legendary champions. Build your deck, harness the forbidden magic of the void, and dominate the battlefield.

paragraphs: The delicate equilibrium of the domains is shattering. A catastrophic phenomenon known as the Aether Bleed is draining the lifeblood from the elemental realms, leaving behind volatile Null Zones where magic backfires and the laws of physics collapse.

As the Void infects the land, wild elemental spirits are twisting into maddened behemoths. Deck wielders must not only fight for territory, but stabilize these reality tears before their chosen domains dissolve into absolute nothingness.

leaderboard: Competitive ladder — ranked match standings across the realm.

portal.gateMessage: The player portal is bound to your account. Sign in to access market, vaults, and profile.
portal.comingSoon: This section is being forged in the void — check back soon.

credits.title: Get Voidborn Credits
credits.subtitle: Base rate: 100 credits = 1 EUR. No discounts or bonus credits.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in with your email and password to continue.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to enter the elemental realms.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we will send a reset link.
auth.resetEmailSent: Check your email for a password reset link.
auth.resetFailed: Could not send reset email. Try again later.
auth.callbackRecoverySubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.callbackPasswordUpdated: Password updated. You can sign in now.
auth.callbackFailed: This link is invalid or expired. Request a new one.
auth.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, and one symbol.
auth.playGateMessage: You must bind your soul to the void before entering the arena.

errors.supabaseUnavailable: Authentication is not configured. Set Supabase env vars on the server.
errors.invalidUsername: Username must be 3–24 characters (letters, numbers, underscore).
errors.invalidPassword: Password needs 8+ characters, one uppercase letter, and one symbol.
errors.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Please try again.
errors.signUpFailed: Registration failed. Try a different email or username.
errors.emailConfirmation: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email before signing in, or use Register if you have no account.
